format: Mohtashami & Jaggi, Landmark Attention, arXiv:2305.16300 (retrieved 2026-07-17); single needle (multi-needle = M3)
metric: exact match of the first regex \d{5} match in the decoded greedy continuation (<= 12 tokens, stop at eot)

segments.preamble: There is an important info hidden inside a lot of irrelevant text. Find it and memorize them. I will quiz you about the important information there.
segments.filler: The grass is green. The sky is blue. The sun is yellow. Here we go. There and back again.
segments.needle_template: The pass key is {key}. Remember it. {key} is the pass key.
segments.question: What is the pass key? The pass key is
